description: Generate and build a web site prototype from a conceptual brief.
_migration_note: v2: Typed Flow format (role/produces/consumes). v1 used type + export_as.

params.instruction: Define and write a complete HTML document for a website based on this concept: {{concept_brief}}. Include landing page sections (Hero, Features, Pricing, Footer). If a design theme is provided ({{design_theme}}), incorporate those brand styles directly into the HTML and CSS. Return a single self-contained HTML string.
